description: Canonical compose file sets for merged docker compose runs and documentation. Keep in sync with ansible/roles/devsecops_containers and lxd_devsecops_stack (devSingleLxc); run scripts/verify-stack-manifest.ps1 after edits.

devSingleLxc.label: One LXC / one Docker daemon: IAM + slim messaging (Postgres, RabbitMQ; no Kafka/NiFi/Solace)
devSingleLxc.note: Ansible: instance devsecops-dev in ansible/roles/lxd_devsecops_stack/defaults/main.yml. Slim only: set lxd_messaging_compose_cli to -f docker-compose.messaging.slim.yml for devsecops-messaging.

identity.note: FreeIPA; optional LDAP backend. See docs/IAM_LDAP_AND_AUTOMATION.md.

siem.note: Wazuh manager/indexer/dashboard; run scripts/bootstrap-wazuh-siem-config.ps1 first. See docs/WAZUH_SIEM.md.
